'''changïfhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okonomiyaki|okonomiyaki]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okonomiyaki|okonomiyaki]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| changïfhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || chængïfhïfth || chængïfhïfj || chængïfhïfsh || chængïfhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || changïfngïfhïfth || changïfngïfhïfj || changïfngïfhïfsh || changïfngïfhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || changïfhïfth || changïfhïfj || changïfhïfsh || changïfhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || changïffhïffth || changïffhïffj || changïffhïffsh || changïffhïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || changïfhïfïf || changïfhïfïf || changïfhïfïf || changïfhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || changïfhïfth || changïfhïfj || changïfhïfsh || changïfhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || changïfhïfïfl || changïfhïfïfl || changïfhïfïfl || changïfhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || changïfhïfïfïf || changïfhïfïfïf || changïfhïfïfïf || changïfhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || changïfhïfïfn || changïfhïfïfn || changïfhïfïfn || changïfhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || changïfhïfïforo || changïfhïfïforo || changïfhïfïforo || changïfhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
